title: The War of Jenkins' Ear
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week:
Wars are not predictable, either in how they start or how they proceed. US CPI numbers suggested that the US inflation is stickier than the respective EU and UK inflation numbers. Markets now expect less than 2x cuts for the US, causing bond yields to rise further (and prices to fall).
